name: andrej-karpathy-skills
description: A Codex-native change-budget workflow for scoped edits, local-contract preservation, and evidence-backed coding work.

interface.shortDescription: Use a change budget and evidence ledger for safer Codex coding work.
interface.longDescription: A Codex skill that gives agents a distinct change-budget protocol for implementation, debugging, refactoring, and review tasks, with explicit boundaries, non-goals, risks, and evidence.
defaultPrompt: Create a change budget for this coding request.
Use implementation mode for this feature.
Use debugging mode for this failure.
Review this patch with an evidence ledger.
